revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-185

Classification of soil particles of natural origin according to size. Note: A distinction is made in decreasing order of particle size between cobbles, gravel, sand, silt and clay.

{{IALAFooter}}
